title: bidens pringlei
intro: Bidens pringlei, also known as Pringle's beggar-ticks, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Bidens pringlei include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Bidens pringlei is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable addition to herbal medicine.
